zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen de Segrave於1179年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福時，他的父親Gilbert Segrave35歲，母親Julian de Chaucombe33歲。他於大約1230年與Ida de Hastings在英國諾福爾可阿希爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1241年9月7日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特 艾比享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stephen de Segrave于1179年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福时，他的父亲Gilbert Segrave35岁，母亲Julian de Chaucombe33岁。他于大约1230年与Ida de Hastings在英国諾福爾可阿希爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1241年9月7日在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特 艾比享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Segrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Seagrave
meanings: English: habitational name from Seagrave (Leicestershire), probably from Old English sēath ‘pit, hole’ + grāf ‘grove’.

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen de Segrave was born in 1179, in Seagrave, Leicestershire, England, his father, Gilbert Segrave, was 35 and his mother, Julian de Chaucombe, was 33. He married Ida de Hastings about 1230, in Ashill, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 7 September 1241, in Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stephen de Segrave est né en 1179, à Seagrave, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert Segrave, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Julian de Chaucombe, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Ida de Hastings environ 1230, à Ashill, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 7 septembre 1241, à Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, England: Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Stephen de Segrave 1179 in Seagrave, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert Segrave 35 und seine Mutter Julian de Chaucombe 33. Er hat um 1230 in Ashill, Norfolk, England Ida de Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 7. September 1241 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen de Segrave è nato il nel 1179 nel Seagrave, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Gilbert Segrave, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Julian de Chaucombe, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Ida de Hastings circa 1230, nel Ashill, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 7 settembre 1241, nel Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Stephen de Segraveが1179年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアセアグラブで生まれた時，父Gilbert Segraveは35歳，母Julian de Chaucombeは33歳であった。約1230年にイギリスノーフォルクアシュイルでIda de Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1241年9月7日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスター アビーで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスター アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen de Segrave(이)가 1179년 영국 레이스스터실르 시그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Segrave(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Julian de Chaucombe(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1230년 영국 노르폴크 애시에서 Ida de Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1241년 9월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 레이스스터 애브브이에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 레이스스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen de Segrave nasceu em 1179, em Seagrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert Segrave, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Julian de Chaucombe, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Ida de Hastings aproximadamente 1230, em Ashill, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1241, em Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stephen de Segrave родился в 1179 г. в местности сиграв, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Gilbert Segrave было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Julian de Chaucombe, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Ida de Hastings около 1230 г. в местности ашилл, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 7 сентября 1241 г. в местности лисестир эбби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности лисестир эбби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Ida de Hastings aproximadamente 1230, en Ashill, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1241, en Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
